IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_1_Payout1_1: During any non-winning spin, if one symbol occupies all of the reel positions in reel 1 and 2, reel 3 will respin until win.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_2_Payout1_2: During any non-winning spin, if one symbol occupies all of the reel positions in reel 1 and 3, reel 2 will respin until win.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_3_Payout1_3: During any non-winning spin, if one symbol occupies all of the reel positions in reel 2 and 3, reel 1 will respin until win.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: At the start of any spin, the Double Reel Feature may be randomly triggered while the reels are spinning.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: During the Double Reel Feature, two reels will be randomly chosen and all symbols inside the two selected reels will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_0_Payout3_0: Multiplier Feature in Full Screen Win
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any spin, if one symbol occupies all of the reel positions in all reels, the Multiplier Feature will be awarded.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: During the Multiplier Feature, the reels will consist only of  x2 symbols, x3 symbols, x5 symbols and x10 symbols.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: After all reels stop spinning, if there are 1 or more additional symbols appearing on the reels, all reels will respin again with the previously appeared symbols staying in their positions.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: After all reels stop spinning, if there are no more additional symbols appearing on the reels, the Multiplier Feature ends and wins are multiplied by the total multipliers on the reels.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: The maximum win amount is %{4500}x of the bet amount.
IncanWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: If the total win in the Multiplier Feature reaches %{4500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

IncanWondersRule.Rule1_1: Incan Wonders is a 3-reel, 3-row video slot featuring respin until win and multiplier up to x90.
IncanWondersRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 5 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}
